title: CHILDCARE & MORE - 211info
text: BEAVERTON FAMILY YMCA CHILDCARE & MORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of preschool, afterschool, and enrichment classes such as art and dance at locations throughout the community. 9685 SW Harvest Court Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Ages 0-18; most activities for ages 0-12 Hours: Varies by service Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 6am-10pm, Friday 6am-9pm, Saturday 7am-6pm Services: Y Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - YOUTH SPORTS PROGRAMS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
